arts.ttl: Bournemouth fume at VAR controversy in Man Utd draw - 'It doesn't make sense'
arts.sum: Bournemouth were left to play with 10 men for 26 minutes against Manchester United after Evanilson was sent off for a foul on Noussair Mazraoui, despite appearing to slip

arts.ttl: Andoni Iraola slams Evanilson red card decision as Bournemouth boss reveals appeal stance following Man United draw
arts.sum: Bournemouth head coach Andoni Iraola criticises the decision to send off Evanilson in Sunday's 1-1 draw with Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Man Utd leave it late as Rasmus Hojlund denies 10-man Bournemouth
arts.sum: Antoine Semenyo’s goal looked set to secure victory for the Cherries until Evanilson’s dismissal.
